insight: encryptCredentialSecretValue early-returns when plaintext starts with enc:v1: prefix, creating an encryption-bypass primitive where attacker-controllable or operator-pasted values matching the prefix are stored unencrypted. Same pattern in capability secrets via cli/credentials.ts:391 import-env.

DEFAULT_APP_ID=default fallback in both gateway getInjection and handleRequest, plus memory-embeddings/memory-query not threading appId through, collapses multi-tenant credentials into a shared default bucket. Watch for appId? optional and silent fallbacks in credential brokers.

When neutralizing user-facing copy, raw tool ids (Bash/RunCommand/mcp__) can still leak through free-text nextAction fields like nextJobHealthAction Approve <toolName> access; neutralize at the source, not just at JSON-shaped request_permission parsing.

On fleet first-boot, a settings-revision NOTIFY landing mid-SIGTERM re-arms the held scheduler/capability subsystems because onFirstRevisionApplied->onSettingsReady never checked isDraining(); the drain stops the scheduler before tearing down the revision listener. Gate held-start hooks on isDraining().

AWS launch templates that enforce IMDSv2 (http_tokens=required) but omit http_put_response_hop_limit default to 1, which blocks a Docker-bridge container from reaching IMDS — silently breaking instance-profile credential resolution (e.g. S3 artifact store) in prod while static-cred local rehearsal hides it. Set hop_limit=2 for containerized runtimes.

Gantry learning loop = capture structured traces + private evals on day 1; defer distill/RL/owned-ELM to a phase gated on volume + an eval/outcome signal. The IP is the loop (capture->eval->improve->deploy), not the weights; the provider-neutral DeepAgents harness already passes the swap-the-generalist test. Memory is necessary but not sufficient (captures facts, not judgment); evolve personas, do not remove them.

Structured/diff-based review misses untracked migration .sql files because git diff excludes untracked files; only an adversarial pass that runs git status / git cat-file -e HEAD: catches a committed-modified _journal.json referencing untracked migrations. Always git-status the migrations dir.
